front_to_back_integration_criterion: N/A — infra/backend-only change to the plugin's own setup script, agent frontmatter, one service-tier module, tests, and docs. No frontend, no UI, no service endpoint. Recorded authorizations: Playwright N/A (no runnable UI) and dev-API integration N/A (no endpoint touched); the verification surface is TDD unit tests with injected runners/checkers, the full pytest suite, the check_separation invariant, and the Phase 3/7 review gates.
